title: Unibos Heavy Duty Wild West Toy Double Barrel Western Shotgun Playset | Lights & Sound | Cowboy Fancy Dress | Kids Fancy Dress Toy Game| Toy Kids Fun Shooting Bullets Blaster
features: Get ready to take on the Wild West with this Double Barrell Hold It Right There Cowboy - With this toy shotgun play set you will be ready for action and take down outlaws

There's a New Sherriff In Town - The sheriff badge will let all the bad guys know who runs this town and With realistic gun sound effects and 2 ejecting shells, you will be transported into the Wild West.
Enter The Wild Wild West - Let imagination run wild, Chase down those outlaws and hear the realistic game sounds and then see the cartridges eject from the barre
Standoff Ready - Full set includes 1x toy shotguns, sheriffs badge and four eject cartridges
Suitable for Ages 3+ and Set includes: double barrel shotgun with sound functions & ejecting shells and 4 play shells. Requires 2 x AA batteries (included)
